tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
Black Cat Intro - Janet Jackson
Rhythm Nation
It’s a song I have always wanted to play.  I wanted a little more detail.
I am giving credit to Jason Read for his tutorial on youtube.  He has a decent "how to" video on Black Cat.
Get your FUNK going!

[Intro]
